name: hitea
summary: Given a single name-sorted Hi-C BAM (examples/test.bam), call non-reference transposable-element (Alu/L1Hs/SVA) insertions and emit them as a candidate.insertions.bed file plus an HTML report.

name: linkhd_ruminotypes_statis
summary: Given the package's built-in Ruminotypes multi-community dataset (16S bacteria, Archaea, 18S protozoa tables over 65 shared cow samples), run LinkData() to integrate the three tables into a single STATIS-ACT compromise consensus, producing per-table RV/generalized-correlation coefficients and a 3-cluster sample partition.

name: parsnip_solubility
summary: Given one protein amino-acid sequence in FASTA format, output a solubility probability in [0,1] ('Probabililty to be soluble: X') written to result.txt.

name: joinet_cv
summary: Given a small feature matrix X and multiple correlated outcomes Y, fit multivariate elastic-net regression by stacked generalisation and cross-validated-predict all outcomes such that the multivariate (meta) model achieves lower prediction loss than separate univariate glmnet (base) models.

name: deeplatentmicrobiome_env2otu
summary: Given 3 environmental features (plant age, temperature, 3-day precipitation) for a maize sample, predict the full 717-OTU rhizosphere microbiome composition using the shipped pretrained domain-encoder + decoder.

name: simurg_simpg
summary: Given the shipped reference multi-FASTA of ancestral genes, run simpg() to simulate a bacterial pangenome and produce a coalescent tree, a gene presence/absence panmatrix, and evolved per-genome FASTA sequence files.

name: dnafeaturesviewer_genbank_plot
summary: Given a GenBank file of a DNA sequence, parse it with Biopython and render a linear matplotlib plot of its annotated features (genes, CDS, restriction sites) to a PNG.

name: posefilter_rms
summary: Given a receptor plus a set of docked ligand poses in a symmetric oligomeric binding site, compute the all-to-all symmetry-aware RMSD matrix and classify each pose as 'Unique' or 'Similar', filtering redundant symmetric poses.

name: interminer_gene_pathway
summary: Given a human gene symbol (ABO), query the live HumanMine InterMine web service via InterMineR's Gene_Pathway template and return the gene's associated pathways as a data frame.

name: pyfeat_dna_features
summary: Given a small DNA FASTA file, generate PyFeat's fixed-length numerical feature vector CSV (zCurve + gcContent + atgcRatio + cumulativeSkew + pseudoKNC k-mer features) with one row per input sequence.

name: phylowga_chromo_phylome
summary: Given the shipped 13-taxon primate whole-genome alignment, run Chromo.Phylome to infer a per-window maximum-likelihood gene tree (Newick) for each sliding window along the chromosome.

name: coconet_binning
summary: Given assembled viral-metagenome contigs (FASTA) plus per-sample read coverage (BAM), bin the contigs into genome clusters, emitting a bins_*.csv contig->cluster assignment.

name: sequoya_nsgaii_msa
summary: Given a BAliBASE protein-sequence instance (unaligned sequences plus several precomputed alignments), run multi-objective NSGA-II to evolve a Pareto front of multiple sequence alignments trading Sum-of-Pairs against Percentage of Totally Conserved Columns.

name: treeexp_expression_tree
summary: Given the bundled tetrapod brain RNA-seq expression profiles, compute a pairwise expression-distance matrix and infer a neighbor-joining 'expression character tree' that recovers the known species phylogeny.

name: tandemmapper
summary: Given Oxford Nanopore long reads and an extra-long-tandem-repeat (ETR) assembly FASTA, run TandemMapper to align the error-prone reads to the ETR and emit a per-read alignment BED file.

name: dysregsig_dysreg
summary: Given the shipped melanoma immunotherapy expression matrix split into responders (CR/PR) vs non-responders (SD/PD) plus the TF-target reference network, run DysReg() to output a non-empty table of gene dysregulations (differential TF->target regulations with per-condition de-biased-LASSO coefficients and confidence intervals).

name: twodimpute
summary: Given the repo's bundled normalized scRNA-seq matrix (ge_10x_sample, 3,774 genes x 338 cells), run run_2DImpute to recover dropout zeros and emit an imputed expression matrix of identical dimensions with recovered zeros filled in.

name: ddap_dd_affinity
summary: Given two FASTA files of type I PKS docking-domain sequences (C-terminal 'head' and N-terminal 'tail'), predict the affinity probability (0-1) and binary compatibility label for each head-tail pair using the shipped pretrained models.

name: pathwayguidedrf_synthetic_features
summary: Given a simulated pathway-annotated gene-expression matrix (cases vs controls), run the pathway-guided random forest to select which pathways carry differential-expression signal.

name: zing_combiner
summary: Given precomputed ZDOCK (template-free) and SPRING (template-based) docking results for one protein pair, combine and re-rank them into a merged top-10 protein-protein complex prediction list (ZING_combined10.txt + ZING_Preds/zing1-10.pdb).
